infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: We need access to your photos to select face images for AI video generation.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: We need camera access to take face photos for video generation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: We need permission to save your AI-generated videos to your gallery.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bloom AI Maker to access your photos to create amazing AI videos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Bloom AI Maker to take photos for AI video generation.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bloom AI Maker to save your AI-generated videos.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Bloom AI Maker to save videos to your gallery.
